title: huggingface/transformers
summary: Hugging Face Transformers：支持文本、视觉、音频和多模态的SOTA模型框架
raw_content: huggingface/transformers: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training. analysis.impact: 作为最广泛使用的模型框架，持续推动AI模型标准化和民主化，对研究和工业界均有深远影响
